ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS RTB DIGITAL MEDIA CORPORATION AND DANIIL KRAVTSOV'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND NOTICE OF MOTION AND FOR STAY OF JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE OCT-19-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS RTB DIGITAL MEDIA CORPORATION AND DANIEL KRAVSTOV'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION TO STAY JUDICIAL PROCEEDINGS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY IS GRANTED. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-08-2021 CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF ARBITRATION STAY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Judicial Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS RTB DIGITAL MEDIA CORPORATION AND DANIEL KRAVSTOV's Petition To Compel Arbitration and Motion To Stay Judicial Proceedings.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants RTB Digital Media Corporation and Daniel Kravstov's petition to compel arbitration and stay is granted.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
